content.en:
In the years that followed.

Ye Tian continued to collect various talents, trying to raise his one-door talent to the legendary level of Ancestral Fu.

In this way, he can easily control a kind of Tao in the future.

That would make it much easier for him to control the space.

On this day, Ye Tian was cultivating, and suddenly the Lord of the Dark Word informed them that there was going to be a meeting.

Ye Tian immediately went.

Soon, the Lords of the Legendary Realm gathered together.

"Lord of the Word, what's the matter?"

Lord Dragongu asked.

The other Legendary Realm Lords were also quite curious, because the Immortal Lords were usually very low-key, and they didn't even go to the meetings of the Legendary Realm Lords, but this time they were invited to a meeting.

That's weird!

The Lord of the Shadows spoke, "I may know some of the origins of the Three Thousand Iris. "

"What, Lord of the Word, do you know the origin of the Three Thousand Kites?"

Many Legendary Realm Lords were shocked

"Yes!" the Lord of the Underworld said, "Didn't I come up with a supreme technique last time, which can be compared to the means of the Peak Legendary Realm Lord, even the Void River Boundary Array can't stop my snooping 08. Because of this supreme skill, I had a conversation with a peak Legendary Realm Lord, and the relationship was not bad, and over the years, I learned a lot of secrets and knowledge from the other party. And once, I happened to know about the three thousand kites. "

"What is the origin of the three thousand kites?"

Ye Tian was also curious and asked.

"It is said that there is a creature that wanders between the past and the future, across the timeline, like the Ancient Tree of Time and Space, and only those of the Eternal Masters can see it. If I'm not mistaken, the Three Thousand Kites are actually made from the scales of the Iris' creatures, and this should be the work of an eternal master. "

Eternal Master!

Many never expected that the Three Thousand Kite Lynx would be involved with the Eternal Master.

"That Eternal Ruler should know that we have obtained three thousand kites, but they will definitely not care, just like one of our small items has been obtained by some small force, and as a treasure, we will not care. Ye Tian said.

Lord Longgu couldn't agree more: "The Endless Lord is right, even if the three thousand iris are subordinate to a certain Eternal Master, the other party will not care about Mi Gan's small items. "

"Lord of the Stygian, is there anything else you haven't said?" asked Lord Longgu.

The Lord of the Dark Word nodded: "Indeed, I also specifically asked the Peak Legendary Realm Lord what the value of the Iris Scale Creature is, and he said that the Iris Creature can be refined into a treasure and can cross the timeline for a short time." In other words, 3,000 kites can be estimated to allow us to cross the timeline, but not for too long. Moreover, once this is done, the three thousand kites will not be able to use it for a long time. "

"Lord of the Word, you want to use the three thousand kites to cross the timeline?"

Ye Tian asked.

"With this plan, although we don't know what will happen during the process of crossing the timeline, the Ancient Tree of Time and Space can definitely be seen, and maybe you can also get some Ancient Leaves of Time and Space, which is valuable enough. If we have other chances, we may still have the hope of being promoted to the peak Legendary Realm Lord. "

"To be honest, I don't think we have any hope of being promoted to the peak Legendary Realm Lord, the Black Water Lord has occupied it for so many years, and there is still no breakthrough, and we are afraid that there is not much hope, so I think it is worth it to gamble with three thousand Iris. "

"Of course, the three thousand iris now belong to the True Immortal Holy Land, so I want to consult with you. "

The Lord of the Word finished speaking, waiting for everyone's reply.

Ye Tian pondered for a moment and asked, "How do you urge the three thousand iris to cross the timeline?"

This is a critical question, and if you don't know, it's useless.

"I really don't know!" "So, if we want to cross the timeline, we need to cooperate with a peak legend realm lord, and the peak legend realm lord can't cross the timeline, they must also be interested in billions of dollars, but if we do this, it is a bit dangerous, so we need your consent." "

"I don't quite agree!" the Frostless Lord retorted, "If we cooperate with the Peak Legendary Realm Lord, the other party will directly take away the three thousand kites, and we will be helpless. It's too risky, and maybe dangerous. Our True Saintless Land can't compete with a peak Legendary Realm Lord, and it is possible that the True Saintless Land will be destroyed if we are not careful. "

"I don't agree with that either. "

Lord Baiheng also said.

The Frostless Lord and the Baiheng Lord were too far away from impacting the Peak Legendary Realm Lord, and the Three Thousand Kiris were of great use to them, so they disagreed.

However, Lord Longgu agreed.

"I do agree, if you have any hope of being promoted to the pinnacle Legendary Realm Lord, all the adventures are worth it. @龙古领主说道.

Except for a few new Legendary Realm Lords, the other ancient Legendary Realm Lords almost all agreed.

Because it is too difficult for them to continue to improve their strength, even if they have three thousand kites, they will only improve their strength in the future, which is comparable to the kind of Blackwater Lord, and there is no hope for any further progress.

Therefore, they were all extremely eager to break through to the top 160 Peak Legendary Realm Lords, and even if there was only a glimmer of hope, they were willing to try.

Abrupt.

The Lord of the Dark Word asked Ye Tian's opinion, "Endless Lord, what do you think, three thousand kites, you have the greatest authority to dispose of it." "

The eyes of many Legendary Realm Lords looked at Ye Tian.

"Endless Lord, don't agree, we can use the three thousand iris to quickly improve our strength now, and your talent is so good, you can quickly control a kind of seed, there is no need to rush to use the three thousand iris, once it is used, the future is not clear, even if it is very smooth, but the three thousand iris can no longer be used for a long time. The Frostless Lord messaged.

Ye Tian did not speak, but was silent for a long time.

In the end, Ye Tian spoke: "You can cross the timeline, but you must find two peak Legendary Realm lords, in this way, you can be safe, at least the two peak Legendary Realm lords will not occupy three thousand kite together, if there is one, in case the other party is greedy and kills us, we have no room to resist." "

"Two Peak Legendary Realm Lords?" the Immortal Lord felt that it made sense, "I will invite the Peak Legendary Realm Lord Ice River Lord, the other party has a good reputation, who is the second Peak Legendary Realm Lord looking for?"

Ye Tian proposed: "I'll go find the white-bearded old man!"
